title: Woman Found Dead in East Charlotte; Investigation Ongoing
summary: A woman was found dead after a welfare check in east Charlotte. The identity of the victim is currently unknown as of March 10, 2026.
charlotte_impact: Highlights potential safety concerns and the need for community vigilance in Charlotte neighborhoods.

title: Charlotte Fire Earns Sixth International Accreditation
summary: Charlotte Fire Department receives its sixth consecutive international accreditation, reflecting its commitment to operational excellence and service delivery.
charlotte_impact: Demonstrates the fire department's dedication to maintaining high standards and ensuring public safety.

title: CMPD Warns Vaping May Contribute to Teen Impaired Driving
summary: Charlotte-Mecklenburg Police Department (CMPD) warns that vaping products may play a role in teen impaired driving incidents.
charlotte_impact: Raises awareness about the potential dangers of vaping and its impact on road safety among young drivers.

title: Measles Outbreak: SCDPH Reports Two New Cases in Upstate
summary: South Carolina Department of Public Health (SCDPH) reports two new measles cases, bringing the total number of cases in the Upstate outbreak to 993.
charlotte_impact: Indicates a significant public health crisis and the need for increased vaccination efforts.

title: Record Highs Expected Before Weather Shift
summary: Record high temperatures are possible today and tomorrow, followed by a return to average March weather and a significant drop next week.
charlotte_impact: Provides a weather forecast and highlights the upcoming temperature fluctuations.

title: ACC Tournament Boosts Charlotte Businesses
summary: The ACC Tournament brings an economic boost to Charlotte businesses, with local vendors reporting increased sales due to visiting fans.
charlotte_impact: Shows the positive economic impact of major sporting events on local businesses in Charlotte.

title: Charges Dismissed in Case Involving Assault on Immigration Officers
summary: Charges dismissed against man accused of assaulting federal immigration officers during Operation Charlotte's Web in November 2025.
charlotte_impact: Provides an update on a legal case involving federal immigration officers.

title: Charlotte City Council Approves Funds for Red Line Design
summary: Charlotte City Council approves $37.9M for the next phase of the Red Line commuter rail design, aiming for 30% completion by the end of 2027.
charlotte_impact: Highlights progress in public transportation infrastructure development in Charlotte.

title: North Carolina Sports Betting Reaches $13B
summary: Two years into legal sports betting, North Carolina reaches $13B in paid bets, with February wagers up more than 10% from February 2025.
charlotte_impact: Demonstrates the growing popularity and economic impact of legal sports betting in North Carolina.

title: NC Leaders Discuss Child Care Challenges
summary: North Carolina leaders discuss growing child care challenges, including long waitlists, rising costs, and fewer facilities, during a legislative oversight meeting.
charlotte_impact: Addresses the critical issues facing the child care system in North Carolina.

title: Mecklenburg County to Lay Out Environmental Costs of I-77 Expansion
summary: Mecklenburg County will unveil an environmental impact report on the I-77 toll lane expansion, highlighting concerns over park losses and air quality.
charlotte_impact: Focuses on the environmental consequences of infrastructure projects.

title: Third Rabies Case of 2026 Reported in Lincoln County
summary: The third rabies case of 2026 has been reported in Lincoln County and referred to the North Carolina Department of Agriculture and Consumer Services.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the ongoing threat of rabies and the importance of animal control measures.

title: Gaston County Man Possessed Child Sex Abuse Material
summary: A Gaston County man was found to be in possession of and sending child sex abuse material. The youngest children seen in the material were infants.
charlotte_impact: Addresses a serious crime involving child exploitation.

title: Two Injured in Indian Trail Plane Crash
summary: Two people were injured after a plane crash in an Indian Trail cow pasture. The NTSB and FAA are investigating the incident.
charlotte_impact: Reports on an aviation accident and the subsequent investigation.

title: Family Wants Charges Dropped in Senior Prank Death
summary: Family of Hall County teacher killed in senior prank gone wrong wants charges dropped against teenagers involved in the incident.
charlotte_impact: Deals with the aftermath of a tragic accident and the legal implications for the teenagers involved.
